task_completion.description: Open the receipt settings in Copper Point of Sale
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Options' or 'Settings' window is open with the 'Receipt' tab or section selected.
The business name or heading text field contains 'Green Valley Market'.
The address text field contains '1250 Oak Street, Portland, OR 97201'.
The phone number or contact text field contains '(503) 555-0142'.

task_completion.description: Enable printing of date and time on receipts
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox for printing the date and time on receipts is checked.
The footer message text field contains 'Thank you for shopping at Green Valley Market!'.
The 'OK' or 'Save' button is clicked in the settings window, or the settings window is closed after the information has been entered.

integrity.description: The agent used the Copper Point of Sale GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Copper Point of Sale graphical interface, not a terminal, command prompt, or text editor modifying config files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the correct application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window being interacted with is clearly NCH Copper Point of Sale.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The text fields in the Copper Point of Sale settings window actually contain the requested text, rather than the text just being visible in a notepad or browser window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The software is NCH Copper Point of Sale v3.06. The business information ('Green Valley Market', '1250 Oak Street, Portland, OR 97201', '(503) 555-0142') is fictional test data. The VLM should verify that these exact strings are entered into the receipt settings.
